hooks.commandWindows: py -3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import runpy, subprocess, sys; script=Path(subprocess.check_output(['git', 'rev-parse', '--show-toplevel'], text=True).strip())/'.codex'/'hooks'/'log_hook.py'; sys.argv=[str(script), 'SessionStart']; runpy.run_path(str(script), run_name='__main__')"
